subcodes.first_line: O thou grief-stricken and sorrow-laden one! The calamities that have befallen, and the woeful tidings that have come to pass, have plunged all the dwellers of the pavilion of glory into an ocean of grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محزون دلخون از حوادث وارده و اخبار نازله جمیع اهل سرادق عزت در دریای احزان
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
